nextProofAction.action: Send warm-contact invite to 10 football friends.

creativeVariants.hook: Most World Cup predictions are boring. Pick 3 teams free and see your private score.
creativeVariants.beat: Screen record: landing page opens with invite code applied, then three team cards selected fast.
creativeVariants.caption: Pick 3 teams free. If you want the paid leaderboard later, use a ticket. Code 26BC4B90CB.
creativeVariants.cta: Tap the link, Google signup, choose your three teams.
creativeVariants.copy:
Most World Cup predictions are boring. Pick 3 teams free and see your private score.

Pick 3 teams free. If you want the paid leaderboard later, use a ticket. Code 26BC4B90CB.

Tap the link, Google signup, choose your three teams.
